    SELECT TOP(1) [b].[BillId], [b].[BalanceAmount], [b].[BillDate], [b].[BillNo], [b].[BillType], [b].[BusinessDate], [b].[CreatedAtUtc], [b].[CreatedBy], [b].[CustomerName], [b].[DeletedAtUtc], [b].[DeletedBy], [b].[DiscountAmount], [b].[GrandTotal], [b].[IsActive], [b].[IsDeleted], [b].[OutletId], [b].[PaidAmount], [b].[Phone], [b].[RoundOff], [b].[RowVersion], [b].[ServiceCharge], [b].[ServiceChargeOptIn], [b].[Status], [b].[SubTotal], [b].[TableName], [b].[TaxAmount], [b].[UpdatedAtUtc], [b].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Bills] AS [b]
    WHERE [b].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [b].[BillId] = @__billId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [BillItems] AS [b0] ON [t].[BillId] = [b0].[BillId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [t].[BillId] = [p].[BillId]
ORDER BY [t].[BillId], [b0].[BillItemId]

2026-04-26 05:44:49.136 +04:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (7ms) [Parameters=[@__outletId_0='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM (
    SELECT [s].[ItemId], [s].[ReorderLevel]
    FROM [StockItems] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s0].[BusinessDate], [s0].[CreatedAtUtc], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DeletedAtUtc], [s0].[DeletedBy], [s0].[InQty], [s0].[IsActive], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[OutQty], [s0].[OutletId], [s0].[Rate], [s0].[ReferenceId], [s0].[ReferenceType], [s0].[Remarks], [s0].[RowVersion], [s0].[RunningBalance], [s0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [StockLedger] AS [s0]
        WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [s].[ItemId] = [t].[ItemId]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    GROUP BY [s].[ItemId], [s].[ReorderLevel]
    HAVING COALESCE((
        SELECT TOP(1) [t0].[RunningBalance]
        FROM [StockItems] AS [s1]
        INNER JOIN (

2026-04-26 05:53:55.847 +04:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (20ms) [Parameters=[@__outletId_0='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM (
    SELECT [s].[ItemId], [s].[ReorderLevel]
    FROM [StockItems] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s0].[BusinessDate], [s0].[CreatedAtUtc], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DeletedAtUtc], [s0].[DeletedBy], [s0].[InQty], [s0].[IsActive], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[OutQty], [s0].[OutletId], [s0].[Rate], [s0].[ReferenceId], [s0].[ReferenceType], [s0].[Remarks], [s0].[RowVersion], [s0].[RunningBalance], [s0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [StockLedger] AS [s0]
        WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [s].[ItemId] = [t].[ItemId]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    GROUP BY [s].[ItemId], [s].[ReorderLevel]
    HAVING COALESCE((
        SELECT TOP(1) [t0].[RunningBalance]
        FROM [StockItems] AS [s1]
        INNER JOIN (

    FROM [StockItems] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s0].[BusinessDate], [s0].[CreatedAtUtc], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DeletedAtUtc], [s0].[DeletedBy], [s0].[InQty], [s0].[IsActive], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[OutQty], [s0].[OutletId], [s0].[Rate], [s0].[ReferenceId], [s0].[ReferenceType], [s0].[Remarks], [s0].[RowVersion], [s0].[RunningBalance], [s0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s0].[UpdatedBy]

        WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [s].[ItemId] = [t].[ItemId]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

    HAVING COALESCE((
        SELECT TOP(1) [t0].[RunningBalance]
        FROM [StockItems] AS [s1]
        INNER JOIN (

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM (
    SELECT [s].[ItemId], [s].[ReorderLevel]
    FROM [StockItems] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s0].[BusinessDate], [s0].[CreatedAtUtc], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DeletedAtUtc], [s0].[DeletedBy], [s0].[InQty], [s0].[IsActive], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[OutQty], [s0].[OutletId], [s0].[Rate], [s0].[ReferenceId], [s0].[ReferenceType], [s0].[Remarks], [s0].[RowVersion], [s0].[RunningBalance], [s0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [StockLedger] AS [s0]
        WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [s].[ItemId] = [t].[ItemId]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    GROUP BY [s].[ItemId], [s].[ReorderLevel]
    HAVING COALESCE((
        SELECT TOP(1) [t0].[RunningBalance]

    FROM [StockItems] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s0].[BusinessDate], [s0].[CreatedAtUtc], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DeletedAtUtc], [s0].[DeletedBy], [s0].[InQty], [s0].[IsActive], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[OutQty], [s0].[OutletId], [s0].[Rate], [s0].[ReferenceId], [s0].[ReferenceType], [s0].[Remarks], [s0].[RowVersion], [s0].[RunningBalance], [s0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s0].[UpdatedBy]

    ) AS [t] ON [s].[ItemId] = [t].[ItemId]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

    HAVING COALESCE((
        SELECT TOP(1) [t0].[RunningBalance]
        FROM [StockItems] AS [s1]
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT [s2].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s2].[BusinessDate], [s2].[CreatedAtUtc], [s2].[CreatedBy], [s2].[DeletedAtUtc], [s2].[DeletedBy], [s2].[InQty], [s2].[IsActive], [s2].[IsDeleted], [s2].[ItemId], [s2].[OutQty], [s2].[OutletId], [s2].[Rate], [s2].[ReferenceId], [s2].[ReferenceType], [s2].[Remarks], [s2].[RowVersion], [s2].[RunningBalance], [s2].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s2].[UpdatedBy]

            WHERE [s2].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
        ) AS [t0] ON [s1].[ItemId] = [t0].[ItemId]
        WHERE [s1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s1].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s1].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [s1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[ItemId] = [s1].[ItemId] AND [s].[ReorderLevel] = [s1].[ReorderLevel]
        ORDER BY [t0].[StockLedgerEntryId] DESC), 0.0) <= [s].[ReorderLevel]
) AS [t1]

SELECT TOP(@__p_2) [b].[ItemNameSnapshot] AS [itemName], COALESCE(SUM([b].[Qty]), 0.0) AS [totalQty], COALESCE(SUM([b].[RateSnapshot] * [b].[Qty]), 0.0) AS [totalSales]
FROM [BillItems] AS [b]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [b0].[BillId], [b0].[BusinessDate], [b0].[OutletId], [b0].[Status]
    FROM [Bills] AS [b0]
    WHERE [b0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [b].[BillId] = [t].[BillId]

FROM (
    SELECT [s].[ItemId], [s].[ReorderLevel]
    FROM [StockItems] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s0].[BusinessDate], [s0].[CreatedAtUtc], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DeletedAtUtc], [s0].[DeletedBy], [s0].[InQty], [s0].[IsActive], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[OutQty], [s0].[OutletId], [s0].[Rate], [s0].[ReferenceId], [s0].[ReferenceType], [s0].[Remarks], [s0].[RowVersion], [s0].[RunningBalance], [s0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [StockLedger] AS [s0]
        WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [s].[ItemId] = [t].[ItemId]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    GROUP BY [s].[ItemId], [s].[ReorderLevel]
    HAVING COALESCE((
        SELECT TOP(1) [t0].[RunningBalance]
        FROM [StockItems] AS [s1]
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT [s2].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s2].[BusinessDate], [s2].[CreatedAtUtc], [s2].[CreatedBy], [s2].[DeletedAtUtc], [s2].[DeletedBy], [s2].[InQty], [s2].[IsActive], [s2].[IsDeleted], [s2].[ItemId], [s2].[OutQty], [s2].[OutletId], [s2].[Rate], [s2].[ReferenceId], [s2].[ReferenceType], [s2].[Remarks], [s2].[RowVersion], [s2].[RunningBalance], [s2].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s2].[UpdatedBy]
            FROM [StockLedger] AS [s2]
            WHERE [s2].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
        ) AS [t0] ON [s1].[ItemId] = [t0].[ItemId]
        WHERE [s1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s1].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s1].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [s1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[ItemId] = [s1].[ItemId] AND [s].[ReorderLevel] = [s1].[ReorderLevel]
        ORDER BY [t0].[StockLedgerEntryId] DESC), 0.0) <= [s].[ReorderLevel]
) AS [t1]

SELECT TOP(@__p_2) [b].[ItemNameSnapshot] AS [itemName], COALESCE(SUM([b].[Qty]), 0.0) AS [totalQty], COALESCE(SUM([b].[RateSnapshot] * [b].[Qty]), 0.0) AS [totalSales]
FROM [BillItems] AS [b]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [b0].[BillId], [b0].[BusinessDate], [b0].[OutletId], [b0].[Status]
    FROM [Bills] AS [b0]
    WHERE [b0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [b].[BillId] = [t].[BillId]
WHERE [t].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [t].[BusinessDate] = @__today_1 AND [t].[Status] <> 3
GROUP BY [b].[ItemId], [b].[ItemNameSnapshot]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([b].[Qty]), 0.0) DESC

    SELECT TOP(1) [b].[BillId], [b].[BalanceAmount], [b].[BillDate], [b].[BillNo], [b].[BillType], [b].[BusinessDate], [b].[CreatedAtUtc], [b].[CreatedBy], [b].[CustomerName], [b].[DeletedAtUtc], [b].[DeletedBy], [b].[DiscountAmount], [b].[GrandTotal], [b].[IsActive], [b].[IsDeleted], [b].[OutletId], [b].[PaidAmount], [b].[Phone], [b].[RoundOff], [b].[RowVersion], [b].[ServiceCharge], [b].[ServiceChargeOptIn], [b].[Status], [b].[SubTotal], [b].[TableName], [b].[TaxAmount], [b].[UpdatedAtUtc], [b].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Bills] AS [b]
    WHERE [b].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [b].[BillId] = @__billId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [BillItems] AS [b0] ON [t].[BillId] = [b0].[BillId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [t].[BillId] = [p].[BillId]
ORDER BY [t].[BillId], [b0].[BillItemId]

        FROM [StockItems] AS [s1]
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT [s2].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s2].[BusinessDate], [s2].[CreatedAtUtc], [s2].[CreatedBy], [s2].[DeletedAtUtc], [s2].[DeletedBy], [s2].[InQty], [s2].[IsActive], [s2].[IsDeleted], [s2].[ItemId], [s2].[OutQty], [s2].[OutletId], [s2].[Rate], [s2].[ReferenceId], [s2].[ReferenceType], [s2].[Remarks], [s2].[RowVersion], [s2].[RunningBalance], [s2].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s2].[UpdatedBy]
            FROM [StockLedger] AS [s2]
            WHERE [s2].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
        ) AS [t0] ON [s1].[ItemId] = [t0].[ItemId]
        WHERE [s1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s1].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s1].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [s1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[ItemId] = [s1].[ItemId] AND [s].[ReorderLevel] = [s1].[ReorderLevel]

    SELECT TOP(1) [s0].[RunningBalance]
    FROM [StockLedger] AS [s0]
    WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s0].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [s].[ItemId] = [s0].[ItemId]
